title: Job Gains Offer a Brighter Picture of the U.S. Economy
content: Employers added 531,000 jobs in October, a big improvement from the previous month and a sign of optimism as the latest coronavirus surge eases.

more_info.byline: By Nelson D. Schwartz and Talmon Joseph Smith

en_title: Job Gains Offer a Brighter Picture of the U.S. Economy
en_content: Employers added 531,000 jobs in October, a big improvement from the previous month and a sign of optimism as the latest coronavirus surge eases.

title: In Fate of Oil Field, Climate Activists and Energy Executives See Future

title: Pfizer Says Its Antiviral Pill Is Highly Effective in Treating Covid
content: Pfizer’s is the second pill to show effectiveness against Covid-19, and it is the first purpose-built to attack the virus that causes the disease.
en_title: Pfizer Says Its Antiviral Pill Is Highly Effective in Treating Covid

content: Consumers are likely to see more plan options and lower premiums for next year. “This is a whole new ballgame,” one health expert said.

title: What Red Flags? Elizabeth Holmes Trial Exposes Investors’ Carelessness
content: Start-up investors have often suspended skepticism while chasing a hot deal. The trial of Ms. Holmes, the founder of Theranos, has put that behavior under the spotlight.

title: Aaron Feuerstein, Mill Owner Who Refused to Leave, Dies at 95

title: Boeing directors reach a settlement in a shareholder lawsuit over the 737 Max crashes.
content: The $237.5 million accord is subject to court approval. The plaintiffs said board members had neglected their oversight duties.

title: Google Temps Fought Loss of Pandemic Bonus. And Won.
